reports.pageDesc: Generate clean operational reports with only the filters that matter for each report.

attendance.title: Attendance Report
attendance.description: Attendance records, missing check-outs, and selected-day absence rows.
attendance.empty: No attendance rows match the selected filters.

employees.title: Employee Report
employees.description: Employee status, branch assignment, roles, and device readiness.
employees.empty: No employees match the selected filters.

companies.title: Company Report
companies.description: Companies by plan, branch count, employee count, and subscription state.
companies.empty: No companies match the selected filters.

branches.title: Branch Report
branches.description: Branch staffing, geofence readiness, and today attendance activity.
branches.empty: No branches match the selected filters.

subscriptions.title: Subscription Report
subscriptions.description: Subscription status, dates, prices, and remaining days.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions match the selected filters.

planUsage.title: Plan Usage Report
planUsage.description: Plan adoption and average usage across companies.
planUsage.empty: No plan usage rows match the selected filters.

filters.helper: Adjust filters, then generate. Results stay stable until you refresh them.

actions.printFuture: Print-ready layout will be enabled later.

empty.generateDesc: Choose a report, set the filters you need, then generate results.

errors.references: Some report filters could not be loaded.
